About

Designed for those who crave adventure and innovation, Base Dawgz is bringing you a unique multi-chain experience. At home on Base Chain, $Dawgz will also trade on ETH, SOL, BSC and AVAX. We are not just about pushing boundaries; it's about breaking them. We offer seamless interoperability across multiple blockchains, ensuring you can soar through the decentralized world without limits. Join us on this high-octane journey as we redefine what's possible. Come chase nirvana with Base Dawgz.

About

Designed for those who crave adventure and innovation, Base Dawgz is bringing you a unique multi-chain experience. At home on Base Chain, $Dawgz will also trade on ETH, SOL, BSC and AVAX. We are not just about pushing boundaries; it's about breaking them. We offer seamless interoperability across multiple blockchains, ensuring you can soar through the decentralized world without limits. Join us on this high-octane journey as we redefine what's possible. Come chase nirvana with Base Dawgz.

Tokenomics

$DAWGZ token has it's main landing zone on Base Chain. What makes it a real gripper is the ability to leap across blockchains. You can claim, store, and trade it seamlessly on Ethereum, Solana, BSC, and Avalanche. It’s like a base jump through the blockchains, landing wherever you choose.

  • Presale    20%
  • Staking    20%
  • Liquidity    20%
  • Marketing    15%
  • $Dawgz Rewards    15%
  • Listings    10%

Be social for airdrop

Jump into action with our airdrop campaign to reward your creativity and social engagement. Here’s how it works: Connect your X account, then create and share memes and other content about Base Dawgz. Each piece of content earns you points, and once the presale is complete, you can redeem these points for $DAWGZ tokens. It’s a fun and rewarding way to help market Base Dawgz and join our community’s adventure. Get creative, spread the word, and earn your share of $DAWGZ tokens!

Be social for airdrop

Jump into action with our airdrop campaign to reward your creativity and social engagement. Here’s how it works: Connect your X account, then create and share memes and other content about Base Dawgz. Each piece of content earns you points, and once the presale is complete, you can redeem these points for $DAWGZ tokens. It’s a fun and rewarding way to help market Base Dawgz and join our community’s adventure. Get creative, spread the word, and earn your share of $DAWGZ tokens!

How to buy

Step 1

Connect wallet

Head to the top of this page to find the presale widget. Connect your wallet from a variety of available options to get started. If you are not able to connect, please reach out to us on our official Telegram channel.

Step 2

Select Network

After connecting your wallet, you can opt to join the Base Dawgz presale on your choice of Base, Solana, Ethereum, BSC, or Avalanche chains. Buy either with native currency, or with USDT on Ethereum, bUSD on BSC and USDC on Base.

Step 3

Buy Tokens

Specify the amount of SOL, ETH, BNB, AVAX, USDT, or USDC you’d like to trade for $DAWGZ, and then approve the transaction in your wallet. During presale you will not receive tokens immediately, but will claim them after the presale.

How to buy

Step 1

Connect wallet

Head to the top of this page to find the presale widget. Connect your wallet from a variety of available options to get started. If you are not able to connect, please reach out to us on our official Telegram channel.

Step 2

Select Network

After connecting your wallet, you can opt to join the Base Dawgz presale on your choice of Base, Solana, Ethereum, BSC, or Avalanche chains. Buy either with native currency, or with USDT on Ethereum, bUSD on BSC and USDC on Base.

Step 3

Buy Tokens

Specify the amount of SOL, ETH, BNB, AVAX, USDT, or USDC you’d like to trade for $DAWGZ, and then approve the transaction in your wallet. During presale you will not receive tokens immediately, but will claim them after the presale.

FAQ

Base $DAWGZ is a meme coin inspired by the spirit of base jumping and the cultural phenomenon of the Shiba Inu meme.

You can join the presale on Base, Ethereum, Avalanche, Solana, or BSC. Simply link your wallet to the presale widget provided and use ETH, BNB, AVAX, SOL, or USDT to secure your $DAWGZ tokens.

After finishing your presale purchase, you can use the same wallet to claim your $DAWGZ tokens prior to their first DEX listing. We will announce the claim and listing dates on our social media channels.

Staking means committing your tokens to a smart contract and securing them for a set duration. This process lets you earn extra $DAWGZ tokens at a fluctuating rate over time. At present, Base Dawgz staking is only accessible on the Ethereum network. For the latest updates, check out our social media channels.

We’re here to assist you! For quick support, hop into our Telegram channel where a Base Dawgz moderator will be ready to help. Alternatively, you can send an email to maverick@basedawgz.com and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

FAQ

Base $DAWGZ is a meme coin inspired by the spirit of base jumping and the cultural phenomenon of the Shiba Inu meme.

You can join the presale on Base, Ethereum, Avalanche, Solana, or BSC. Simply link your wallet to the presale widget provided and use ETH, BNB, AVAX, SOL, or USDT to secure your $DAWGZ tokens.

After finishing your presale purchase, you can use the same wallet to claim your $DAWGZ tokens prior to their first DEX listing. We will announce the claim and listing dates on our social media channels.

Staking means committing your tokens to a smart contract and securing them for a set duration. This process lets you earn extra $DAWGZ tokens at a fluctuating rate over time. At present, Base Dawgz staking is only accessible on the Ethereum network. For the latest updates, check out our social media channels.

We’re here to assist you! For quick support, hop into our Telegram channel where a Base Dawgz moderator will be ready to help. Alternatively, you can send an email to maverick@basedawgz.com and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
